text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text: Morning, Ines! I see you're full of energy as usual.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text: Actually, I've got a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I want to put you on a new task. You always do a
great job of things, so I'm leaving this one in your
hands.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back, Ines. Hey, you look happy.
Something good happen?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Well, I got given a really important task
today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So I'm really happy my manager thinks of me as a
reliable worker. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Congrats! I mean, you're always doing your very
best, so it's no wonder everyone values you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. You're going to make me blush saying
that stuff right to my face.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Time to prove that my manager was
right to trust me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being assigned a difficult job, Ines Fujin
comes away having learned a few new things.
